description: Letter in Arabic script. Written in large, calligraphic script. Containing a renunciation of a friendship. The details are left very vague. The sender refers to "even before I went to Alexandria." Opens with Job 12:10 (translated into Arabic) and ends with a rare ṣalwala (ṣalawāt allāh ʿalā....) for the prophet Moses. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
